title: Decision
description: The deterministic governance result for an Action. Public outcome and internal gate level remain separate concepts.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this governance decision.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier for the agent that requested the Action.

gate_level.description: Internal governance gate selected for the Action.

decision_source.description: Producer-defined source of the decision, such as a policy engine, freeze rule, or failure handler.

policy_digest.description: Opaque digest of the exact policy artifact used for evaluation.

reason_codes.description: Stable, machine-readable reasons for the outcome.

risk_score.description: Risk score on the existing TealTiger 0-100 scale.

evaluation_time_ms.description: Elapsed governance evaluation time in milliseconds.

contractVersion.description: Semantic contract version. This package supports major version 1 and emits 1.0.0.

reversibilityClass.description: Authoritative design-time reversibility class; risk may raise but never lower its gate floor.
